concerns.detail: Added initials 'dyf' identifying a specific student (referred to as the girlfriend 'npy' of professor 'ghr'), which constitutes personally identifying information about a private individual.
Inserted personal insult attacking the previous commenter ('清醒点傻孩子' / 'wake up silly child'), which is a pure personal attack without substantive criticism of advising practices.
concerns.excerpt: 还知情人，你别做梦了，清醒点傻孩子
